purpose: Held-out routing benchmark. Queries are written in natural analyst language and MUST NOT be copied from prompt titles/missions. The corpus is never edited to satisfy this benchmark.
anti_overfit_rules: Never edit the prompt catalog to contain a benchmark query's terms.
Never tune scoring constants per individual case.
Ambiguous clusters are intentional (Professional Services x3, Legal/Compliance x2, Federal Civilian x20).

cases.query: Map our system controls to the full 800-53 control families
Walk an authorization package through the risk management framework steps
Establish an ongoing security monitoring cadence with metrics
Protect controlled unclassified information in a contractor enclave
Prepare our defense supplier for a level 2 maturity certification assessment
Review criminal justice information handling in police records systems
Safeguard federal tax information shared with a state revenue agency
Design the trusted internet connection boundary for a cloud migration
Roll out continuous diagnostics and mitigation dashboards across agencies
Align information resource management policy with circular guidance
Meet the mandated maturity tiers for federal event logging
cases._rewritten_reason: de-contaminated: original query shared a verbatim span with the target document
